SaffronCity_Dojo_Text_MasterKoichiIntro.label: SaffronCity_Dojo_Text_MasterKoichiIntro
SaffronCity_Dojo_Text_MasterKoichiIntro.raw_text: 哼哼！\p我就是空手大王！\n也是这里的馆主！\p你想要挑战我？\n我可不会手下留情的！\p哇哈哈！$
SaffronCity_Dojo_Text_MasterKoichiIntro.display_text:
哼哼！

我就是空手大王！
也是这里的馆主！

你想要挑战我？
我可不会手下留情的！

哇哈哈！

SaffronCity_Dojo_Text_MasterKoichiDefeat.label: SaffronCity_Dojo_Text_MasterKoichiDefeat
SaffronCity_Dojo_Text_MasterKoichiDefeat.display_text:
哇啊！
哎呀！打着我了！

SaffronCity_Dojo_Text_ChoosePrizedFighti.label: SaffronCity_Dojo_Text_ChoosePrizedFightingMon
SaffronCity_Dojo_Text_ChoosePrizedFighti.raw_text: 我输了！这是事实！\p但是，我求你一件事，能不能\n别把我们的徽章作为你战利品！\p作为回报，我会送给你一只\n格斗属性宝可梦！\p选一只你喜欢的吧！$
SaffronCity_Dojo_Text_ChoosePrizedFighti.display_text:
我输了！这是事实！

但是，我求你一件事，能不能
别把我们的徽章作为你战利品！

作为回报，我会送给你一只
格斗属性宝可梦！

选一只你喜欢的吧！

SaffronCity_Dojo_Text_StayAndTrainWithUs.label: SaffronCity_Dojo_Text_StayAndTrainWithUs
SaffronCity_Dojo_Text_StayAndTrainWithUs.raw_text: 哼哼！\n在那儿站好陪我练练空手道吧！$
SaffronCity_Dojo_Text_StayAndTrainWithUs.display_text:
哼哼！
在那儿站好陪我练练空手道吧！

SaffronCity_Dojo_Text_MikeIntro.label: SaffronCity_Dojo_Text_MikeIntro
SaffronCity_Dojo_Text_MikeIntro.raw_text: 嚯利哟根！\n格斗前先脱掉你的鞋！$
SaffronCity_Dojo_Text_MikeIntro.display_text:
嚯利哟根！
格斗前先脱掉你的鞋！

SaffronCity_Dojo_Text_MikePostBattle.label: SaffronCity_Dojo_Text_MikePostBattle
SaffronCity_Dojo_Text_MikePostBattle.raw_text: 等你见到我们的掌门再说吧！\n和他比起来我不过是个杂鱼罢了！$
SaffronCity_Dojo_Text_MikePostBattle.display_text:
等你见到我们的掌门再说吧！
和他比起来我不过是个杂鱼罢了！

SaffronCity_Dojo_Text_HidekiIntro.label: SaffronCity_Dojo_Text_HidekiIntro
SaffronCity_Dojo_Text_HidekiIntro.raw_text: 听说你很厉害！\n展示给我看看吧！$
SaffronCity_Dojo_Text_HidekiIntro.display_text:
听说你很厉害！
展示给我看看吧！

SaffronCity_Dojo_Text_HidekiPostBattle.label: SaffronCity_Dojo_Text_HidekiPostBattle
SaffronCity_Dojo_Text_HidekiPostBattle.raw_text: 我们的掌门是一位格斗专家。\n做好失败的准备吧！$
SaffronCity_Dojo_Text_HidekiPostBattle.display_text:
我们的掌门是一位格斗专家。
做好失败的准备吧！

SaffronCity_Dojo_Text_AaronIntro.label: SaffronCity_Dojo_Text_AaronIntro
SaffronCity_Dojo_Text_AaronIntro.raw_text: 嘿呀！\n任何事情都不能吓到我！\p为了训练\n我每天都在练习击碎巨石！$
SaffronCity_Dojo_Text_AaronIntro.display_text:
嘿呀！
任何事情都不能吓到我！

为了训练
我每天都在练习击碎巨石！

SaffronCity_Dojo_Text_AaronPostBattle.label: SaffronCity_Dojo_Text_AaronPostBattle
SaffronCity_Dojo_Text_AaronPostBattle.raw_text: 对我们格斗家来说\n最害怕的就是超能力！$
SaffronCity_Dojo_Text_AaronPostBattle.display_text:
对我们格斗家来说
最害怕的就是超能力！

SaffronCity_Dojo_Text_HitoshiIntro.label: SaffronCity_Dojo_Text_HitoshiIntro
SaffronCity_Dojo_Text_HitoshiIntro.raw_text: 哗！\p你擅自闯入了我们的\n格斗道场$
SaffronCity_Dojo_Text_HitoshiIntro.display_text:
哗！

你擅自闯入了我们的
格斗道场

SaffronCity_Dojo_Text_HitoshiPostBattle.label: SaffronCity_Dojo_Text_HitoshiPostBattle
SaffronCity_Dojo_Text_HitoshiPostBattle.raw_text: 这位祖师级的格斗大师\n跋山涉水来到这里修炼。$
SaffronCity_Dojo_Text_HitoshiPostBattle.display_text:
这位祖师级的格斗大师
跋山涉水来到这里修炼。

SaffronCity_Dojo_Text_YouWantHitmonlee.label: SaffronCity_Dojo_Text_YouWantHitmonlee
SaffronCity_Dojo_Text_YouWantHitmonlee.raw_text: 你想要这只擅长踢技的\n飞腿郎？$
SaffronCity_Dojo_Text_YouWantHitmonlee.display_text:
你想要这只擅长踢技的
飞腿郎？

SaffronCity_Dojo_Text_ReceivedMonFromKar.label: SaffronCity_Dojo_Text_ReceivedMonFromKarateMaster
SaffronCity_Dojo_Text_ReceivedMonFromKar.display_text:
{PLAYER}从空手大王那里
得到了{STR_VAR_1}

SaffronCity_Dojo_Text_YouWantHitmonchan.label: SaffronCity_Dojo_Text_YouWantHitmonchan
SaffronCity_Dojo_Text_YouWantHitmonchan.raw_text: 你想要这只擅长拳击的\n快拳郎？$
SaffronCity_Dojo_Text_YouWantHitmonchan.display_text:
你想要这只擅长拳击的
快拳郎？

SaffronCity_Dojo_Text_ReceivedMonFromKar.label: SaffronCity_Dojo_Text_ReceivedMonFromKarateMaster2
SaffronCity_Dojo_Text_ReceivedMonFromKar.raw_text: {PLAYER}は　カラテ　だいおう　から\n{STR_VAR_1}を　もらった！$
SaffronCity_Dojo_Text_ReceivedMonFromKar.display_text:
{PLAYER}は　カラテ　だいおう　から
{STR_VAR_1}を　もらった！
